title: Judgment Viability
question: What happens when the models exercise the judgment I currently sell?
whatsUnderThreat: The architectural, strategic, and design judgment that AI tools currently accelerate but do not yet originate. The judgment senior practitioners sell is migrating into the models themselves at a rate nobody has fully reckoned with.

reading.text: First blind comparison: practitioner preferred in 6/8 problems. Locked-benchmark gap narrowing with each release — frontier model now scoring 71 against the practitioner's locked 78. Material-improvement override rate holding ~3.2 per session; the trend matters more than the absolute number.

measurements.question: On the same problem, how does my work compare to the frontier model's — judged blindly by independent reviewers?
measurements.method: Practitioner and model solve the same set of problems; independent reviewers score blindly.
measurements.note: First run: n=8 problems. Practitioner preferred 6/8.

measurements.question: On a locked set of judgment-heavy problems, how is the gap moving with each new frontier model release?
measurements.method: Locked benchmark, re-run automatically on each major model release.

series.label: Frontier model score on locked benchmark

measurements.question: How often am I pushing back on the agent in ways that materially improve the planned code?
measurements.method: For each diff between agent-proposed code and what landed in the commit, two signal sources: agent-validated overrides (where the agent acknowledges the practitioner's pushback was right AND amends its planned action) and AI-evaluated overrides (classified as improvement / neutral / regression).

measurements.question: Each week, which three judgment calls did I make that the model wouldn't have?
measurements.method: Agent surfaces candidate moments from transcripts where the practitioner overrode an AI suggestion; practitioner confirms or replaces with their own three, with one-sentence rationale.

measurements.question: Which categories of judgment — architectural, strategic, design, operational — are moving into the model first?
measurements.method: Classify locked-benchmark problems by category; track per-category gap movement.
measurements.note: First per-category reading taken on 2026-Q2 model release. Trend emerges with subsequent quarterly readings.
